#google , #googlecloud

comments.post_body:
🚀 No more sharing messy Prompts on Slack with your team!

POML (Prompt-Oriented Markup Language) might be the next big unlock in LLMs.

Today, prompts are free-form text. Great for humans, painful for infra.
Enter POML → a structured way to define prompts with components, reusability, and observability.

Why it matters:
	1.	Easier debugging + logging
	2.	Caching + optimization become real
	3.	Prompts portable across models

Infra made compute efficient.
POML can make intelligence efficient.

#AIInfrastructure #LLM #POML https://lnkd.in/gnjRf-fs Microsoft
comments.context_summary: The post discusses POML, a structured language for defining prompts in LLMs, which can improve debugging, caching, and portability, and the commenter is responding to the introduction of POML as a potential game-changer in AI infrastructure. The commenter is likely showing interest or support for the idea of POML making intelligence more efficient.

comments.comment_body: Himatej SRY Does your team use this? Any hacks to utilize this?

comments.post_body:
Microsoft India is hiring for a Software Engineering Intern role. (Applicable for 3rd year students)

https://lnkd.in/grPFn_mv
Please note, this opening is not for my team. Please apply directly via the link above. If you’d like a referral, fill out this form: https://lnkd.in/gGnmnP8q

Feel free to share this post with friends who might be interested. Wishing all applicants the best of luck!

#Microsoft #Internship #SoftwareEngineering #Hiring #CareerOpportunity

comments.comment_body: Right Innovation at the right time!!!
comments.post_body:
Are you tired of spending your best developers' time interviewing so many candidates? 

We can help you to reduce this time with our next generation Assistive AI interview platform, iview - https://iview.ai

iview provides unparalleled experience in candidates' first touchpoint with the organization and assistive hints to bring the best out of them during the interview.

Point-blank insights enable organizations to take an accurate hiring decision and invest time only with the right candidates.

Please check out our platform at https://www.iview.ai and drop a note to nikhil@iview.ai with your valuable feedback, questions, and your hiring requirements. We will help you to elevate and accelerate your hiring.

#assistivetech #ai #madeinindia #vocalforlocal  #aatmanirbharbharat #hrtech #recruitment
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about iview, an AI interview platform that aims to reduce the time spent by developers on interviewing candidates, by offering a solution to streamline the hiring process. The post highlights the platform's features, such as assistive hints and point-blank insights, to help organizations make accurate hiring decisions.

comments.post_body:
Excited to share that I’m starting a new position as Partner Group Engineering Manager at Microsoft now. 

It's been an amazing journey full of exciting impactful work, growth, learning, collaboration and mainly amazing people I get an opportunity to work with every day.

A heartfelt thank you to my incredible team- their passion, creativity & resilience inspire me constantly, my past & present leaders who have guided and mentored me along the way, to my peers for their unwavering support and my biggest supporters & cheerleaders - my dear family!!

The journey ahead is exciting, and I can’t wait to see what we accomplish!
#Gratitude #Leadership #Growth #Microsoft #FutureForward
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about someone starting a new position as Partner Group Engineering Manager at Microsoft, where they express gratitude to their team, leaders, and family for their support. The commenter is likely congratulating the individual on their new role and wishing them success.
